title: 100 Push-Ups Challenge
description: Complete 100 push-ups every day for 7 days.
longDescription: Complete 100 push-ups every day for 7 consecutive days to build upper body strength.
requirements: Be able to do at least 20 push-ups
No injuries to arms or shoulders

title: 10,000 Steps Challenge
description: Walk at least 10,000 steps daily for 14 days.
longDescription: Walk at least 10,000 steps every day for 14 days to improve cardiovascular health.
tips: Use a pedometer or smartphone app

title: Plank Master
description: Hold a plank for 3 minutes every day for 10 days.
longDescription: Hold a plank position for 3 minutes daily for 10 days to strengthen your core muscles.

title: Yoga Streak
description: Do 20 minutes of yoga for 21 days straight.
longDescription: Practice yoga for 20 minutes daily for 21 days to improve flexibility and mindfulness.

title: Squat Power
longDescription: Complete 200 squats every day for 30 days to build leg strength and endurance.

title: Jump Rope Challenge
description: Jump rope for 15 minutes daily for 14 days.
longDescription: Jump rope for 15 minutes every day for 14 days to improve cardiovascular fitness and coordination.

title: Plank Variations
description: Perform 5 different plank variations daily for 10 days.
longDescription: Perform 5 different plank variations daily to strengthen your core and improve stability.

title: Morning Stretch
description: Stretch for 10 minutes every morning for 21 days.
longDescription: Perform a 10-minute stretching routine every morning to improve flexibility and reduce stiffness.
